Tests if the modulus of Infinity and 3 results in NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the result of the modulus operation between `Infinity` and the number `3`. The expression `Infinity % 3` is expected to return `NaN` (Not-a-Number), and the `assert` function verifies this condition. If the result is not `NaN`, the assertion will fail, indicating an error in the expected behavior of the modulus operation with `Infinity`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected outcome.
